overview: A learning/demo payment ledger for Reticulum/LXMF mesh network users with balance tracking, HTLC (Hash Time Locked Contract) management, and a React dashboard.
features: Check LXMF hash balance with auto-refresh
Test faucet to deposit demo funds
Create HTLCs with sender, receiver, amount, payment hash, and expiry
Release HTLCs by entering the correct preimage
Persistent event log of all ledger operations
